challenges.title: 30-Day Shred
challenges.description: Transform your body in 30 days with intense daily workouts designed to burn fat and build lean muscle. Each day brings a new challenge, pushing you closer to your goals.

challenges.title: Push-Up Master
challenges.description: From zero to 100 push-ups. Build upper body strength and endurance with this progressive training program. Perfect for all fitness levels.

challenges.title: Core Crusher
challenges.description: Develop rock-solid abs and core stability with targeted exercises and nutrition guidance. Four weeks to a stronger midsection.

challenges.title: Runner's Edge
challenges.description: Improve your running speed and endurance with structured training plans. From 5K to marathon prep.

challenges.title: Flexibility Flow
challenges.description: Increase mobility and reduce injury risk with daily stretching and yoga-inspired routines. Perfect complement to strength training.

challenges.title: Beast Mode
challenges.description: The ultimate strength challenge. 12 weeks of progressive overload training designed to maximize muscle growth and power.
